contact.address: 1234 Sainte-Catherine St W, Montreal, QC H3G 1P1

team.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
team.bio: Dr. Chen has 12 years of experience and a special interest in helping anxious patients feel comfortable.

services.name: Cleaning & Exam
services.description: Full cleaning with X-rays and comprehensive exam

services.name: Invisalign Consultation
services.description: Free consultation with digital scanning — no impressions needed

services.name: Teeth Whitening
services.description: In-office whitening, 3-4 shades lighter in one session

services.name: Dental Emergency
services.description: Same-day emergency slots reserved daily — call ahead

services.name: New Patient Exam
services.description: Comprehensive first visit including full X-ray series

insurance.notes: We handle all insurance paperwork. Bring your insurance card and we take care of the rest.

parking: Free parking available in the Cavendish Mall lot — enter from Côte-Saint-Luc Road
accessibility: Fully wheelchair accessible. Elevator available. Please call ahead so we can assist.

faqs.question: Do you accept new patients?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're always welcoming new patients. Book online or reply here and we'll get you set up.

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: Reply to this message with your preferred day and time, or call us at (514) 561-8268 during business hours.

faqs.question: Do you accept walk-ins?
faqs.answer: We reserve a few same-day slots for emergencies. Call us in the morning to check availability.

faqs.question: How long is a cleaning appointment?
faqs.answer: A standard cleaning and exam takes about 60 minutes. New patients should allow 75 minutes.

faqs.question: Do you offer payment plans?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible payment plans. Ask us about financing options at your visit.

bookingInstructions: Reply with your preferred day and time, or call (514) 561-8268. We'll confirm within 2 hours.
emergencyProtocol: For dental emergencies (severe pain, swelling, broken tooth), call us immediately at (514) 561-8268. We keep same-day emergency slots available Mon-Fri.
customInstructions: Always mention free parking if a patient asks about location. Never promise a specific doctor unless asked directly. If a patient mentions anxiety, acknowledge it warmly before anything else.
